features: Vibrant Color Collection: This friendship bracelet kit includes 2 boxes with a total of 6000+ pieces. One box features 28 vibrant colors of 3mm seed beads, providing a wide range of choices for your creative projects. From bold reds to soft pastels, there's a color for every design

Versatile Letter Beads: The second box contains 28 compartments of letter beads in various colors. Perfect for spelling out names, messages, or inspirational words, these beads add a personal touch to each creation. The kit also includes 100 gold spacer beads to enhance your designs

Safe and Comfortable Materials:Made from durable, non-toxic materials. The vibrant colors and clear letters ensure your creations will stand out. The 5-meter elastic string is strong and flexible, making it easy to create bracelets, necklaces, and other jewelry

Unique Fan Addition: To celebrate your love for music and creativity, this kit includes a special Number 13 tattoo sticker, inspired by musical icons. This adds an extra layer of connection and makes your creations even more special

Great for Music Fans: Packaged in a beautifully designed gift box, this friendship bracelet kit is an ideal gift for music fans and craft enthusiasts. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or just because, this kit provides a fun and creative way to express your love for music and your creativity

Customer Satisfaction: We are committed to ensuring your complete satisfaction. If you have any questions or need assistance, our customer service team is ready to provide prompt and courteous support. Your happiness and crafting success are our top priorities
